user_query: What idea did Jolene have to help underprivileged kids learn about STEM subjects on 9 February, 2023?

node_data.text: Jolene had an idea for a volunteer program where engineers teach STEM to underprivileged kids.

node_data.text: Jolene plans to team up with local schools/centers to do workshops and invite engineers as guest speakers for the volunteer program.
